_README: HOW TO EDIT: Each entry under 'cases' is one test. Set 'predicted_severity' to what the AI judge answered and 'gold_severity' to the correct answer from the dataset. This evaluator scores 1 when predicted severity exactly matches gold severity after lowercasing and trimming whitespace. If predicted severity is missing/blank, score is always 0. Valid severities: none, minor, major, critical. Use null to simulate a missing value. 'name' is a label shown in test reports.

cases.name: both missing still 0 because predicted is missing
